Our Story

Living our culture of progress and belonging.

We started in 2016 as a pharmacy with one commitment: every patient deserves verified, high-quality medicines. What began as a single operation became a mission to manufacture and distribute under our own brand.

Under the Sterlington Pharma brand, we now source and distribute sterile injectable and oral pharmaceutical products to hospitals, licensed distributors, and healthcare institutions across Central Asia and the Caucasus.

2016
Founded
19+
Products
8
Markets
What We Fight

Understanding the science
behind every product we supply.

Every injectable antibiotic, antifungal and IV infusion in our portfolio is selected because of what it does at the cellular level — combating bacterial resistance, restoring metabolic function, and protecting patients when it matters most.

View Our Portfolio
By The Numbers

Results we are proud of.

Since 2016 we have built a track record of reliable supply, verified partnerships and on-time delivery across some of the most demanding healthcare markets in Central Asia.

How We Work

How we treat our partners
and suppliers.

We do not treat partnerships as transactions. Every distributor, hospital and supplier we work with receives the same standard: transparency, reliability and long-term commitment.

01 — Partners

We treat distributors as long-term allies

We share full product documentation, batch records and regulatory support from day one. Our distributors are not just customers — they are part of how we deliver quality to patients.

02 — Suppliers

We hold our suppliers to the highest standard

We source exclusively from GMP-certified manufacturers. Every supplier undergoes due diligence before we list a single product. We visit, verify and maintain ongoing relationships built on mutual accountability.

03 — Institutions

We serve hospitals with the seriousness they deserve

Hospital procurement teams depend on reliability above everything. We provide consistent lead times, full traceability and complete documentation packages with every order.

Partnership Process

From first conversation
to active supply.

We keep the process simple, transparent and fast. Most new partnerships are fully onboarded within a few weeks.

01

Initial Enquiry

You reach out via our contact form or directly by phone. We respond within one business day with a full introduction and product catalogue tailored to your market.

02

Qualification

We verify your licensing, distribution infrastructure and regulatory standing. This protects both parties and ensures every product we supply reaches compliant hands.

03

Product Selection

We work with you to identify which products are most relevant to your market, considering therapeutic need, regulatory clearance and local demand.

04

Documentation Package

We provide complete batch records, GMP certificates and Certificates of Analysis. You receive everything needed for your local regulatory submission before the first shipment.

05

First Shipment

Cold chain logistics arranged and tracked from our supplier to your warehouse. We follow up after delivery to confirm receipt and product quality.

"We built Sterlington not as a business first — but as a commitment. A commitment that every institution we supply can trust what arrives at their door."
PETKOV, Daniel Milchev — Founder & Director

PETKOV, Daniel Milchev

Founder & Director · Sterlington Pharma

Born in Bulgaria, Daniel Milchev Petkov founded Sterlington Injectable Pharmaceutical UK Ltd with a clear vision: to build a pharmaceutical supply company that operates with the discipline of a manufacturer and the integrity of a trusted partner. Registered in Edinburgh, Scotland, Sterlington has grown from its 2016 origins into a recognised B2B distributor across eight markets in Central Asia and the Caucasus.

Where We Operate

Distribution across Central Asia
and the Caucasus.

We distribute directly to licensed partners and healthcare institutions across eight countries, with full documentation and cold chain logistics for every shipment.

Quality & Compliance

Standards you can rely on.

We maintain rigorous compliance across our entire supply chain. Every product meets internationally recognised pharmaceutical requirements before it leaves our supplier.

01 — Sourcing

GMP-Certified Manufacturers Only

We source exclusively from Good Manufacturing Practice certified facilities. No exceptions, regardless of price or availability pressure.

02 — Logistics

Cold Chain Integrity

Temperature-controlled logistics from manufacturer to final destination. Every shipment tracked and documented throughout transit.

03 — Documentation

Full Batch Documentation

Certificates of Analysis, batch records and import certificates provided with every product. Inspection-ready from day one.

04 — Regulation

UK Regulatory Alignment

Operating in full compliance with MHRA guidelines and UK pharmaceutical import standards.

05 — Verification

Counterparty Due Diligence

Rigorous KYC and partner verification for every new relationship. We know exactly who we supply to and why.

06 — Traceability

End-to-End Traceability

Complete product traceability from manufacturer batch number to final destination. Every vial accounted for.

Our Portfolio

A curated portfolio of 19 products.

Every product sourced from GMP-certified manufacturers, supplied with complete batch documentation. Click any product to view full specifications and pricing.

Build your supply programme
with confidence.

Whether you are establishing your first import programme or scaling national distribution, Sterlington offers a supply platform built for what comes next.
